Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 650}I'm calling dibs on this futon! This corner is the best one...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 650}There were doodles all over my face when I woke up this morning...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 650}I'll get my revenge if I have to stay up all night...[n]{f 1 1}
